What We Do

Corporate Tax Services

Pass-through, C-Corp, multi-state — we handle the full lifecycle of business tax compliance and strategy.

S-Corp Tax Returns (1120-S)

Form 1120-S preparation, K-1 distributions, reasonable compensation analysis, basis tracking, and built-in gains modeling for shareholder-level optimization.

Partnership Returns (1065)

Form 1065, K-1 allocations, 704(b) capital accounts, and special allocation modeling.

C-Corp Tax (1120)

Form 1120 preparation, NOL planning, dividend strategy, and deferred tax tracking.

Multi-State Apportionment

Nexus studies, state filings, apportionment factor analysis, and SALT planning across 50 states.

R&D Tax Credits

Section 41 qualification, four-part test documentation, payroll offset, and amended returns to capture missed credits.

Tax Provision (ASC 740)

GAAP tax provisions, deferred tax inventories, valuation allowance analysis, and audit-ready workpapers.

Track Record

Results That Speak

Real numbers from real engagements. Filed, accepted, defended.

About

Licensed.
Strategic. Trusted.

Halcyon Business CPA is built around one principle: the tax code rewards taxpayers who plan. We work exclusively with closely held businesses on entity strategy, multi-state compliance, and credit capture.

Every engagement starts with a free consultation. We assess your structure, identify the highest-leverage moves, and give you a clear scope before any work begins.

How It Works

Engagement in Three Steps

Clear scope. Defined deliverables. No surprises at year-end.

1

Entity & Structure Review

We review your prior returns, organizational chart, and ownership to identify exposure and opportunity.

2

Strategy & Scope

Fixed-fee proposal with deliverables, timeline, and projected savings — signed before work begins.

3

File & Optimize

Returns filed, K-1s distributed, credits captured. Year-round planning for the next filing cycle.

Client Reviews

What Clients Say

“
They restructured us to an S-Corp and captured $46K in R&D credits we'd left on the table for three years. Our former CPA never even raised it.

Series A Software Co.
“
We file in 14 states. Our nexus exposure was a constant headache until Halcyon mapped it cleanly and built a defensible apportionment workbook.
Manufacturing CFO
Industrial Equipment, $40M Rev

Our partnership has 11 partners and special allocations. They handled the 704(b) capital accounts cleanly and the K-1s went out two weeks early.
